title: hieracium vasconicum subsp. pseudoboreale
intro: Hieracium vasconicum subsp. pseudoboreale, also known as Hieracium pseudoboreale, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hieracium pseudoboreale include its ability to aid in the treatment of kidney stones, urinary tract infections, and digestive issues. Traditionally, Hieracium pseudoboreale is prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
